summary: Completed comprehensive SEO optimization testing for Revium Labs B2B analytics agency website. Tested meta tags, page titles, sitemap.xml, robots.txt, and Related Services component across all pages.

seo_issues.issue: JSON-LD structured data scripts not rendering in browser despite being implemented in code
seo_issues.description: Structured data schemas are defined in code but not appearing in DOM - may be React Helmet rendering issue

passed_tests: Homepage title: 'Revium Labs — B2B Analytics, CRO & AI-Powered Revenue Growth'
CRO page title: 'Conversion Rate Optimization for B2B SaaS — Revium Labs'
Analytics page title: 'B2B Analytics & Attribution Agency — Revium Labs'
Paid Advertising page title contains 'LinkedIn ABM & Google Ads'
Our Model page (pricing) title: 'How We Build Your Revenue Engine — Revium Labs'
Partners page title: 'Tools & Technology Partners — Revium Labs'
Contact page title: 'Request a Revenue Teardown — Revium Labs'
Contact page H1: 'Request your Revenue Teardown.'
Sitemap.xml accessible and contains valid XML structure with all required URLs
Related Services component present on CRO, Analytics, and Paid Advertising pages
All pages have proper meta descriptions, Open Graph tags, and canonical URLs
Navigation menu includes all required pages
success_percentage: frontend: 95% - All major SEO elements working except structured data rendering
action_item_for_main_agent: Investigate React Helmet structured data rendering issue - JSON-LD scripts are defined in PageMeta component but not appearing in browser DOM. May need to check React Helmet async configuration or script rendering timing.
